name: The Mustache
effect: Confer legitimacy upon the bearer through visible facial distinction. This card is considered authoritative.

clauses.name: GRAVITAS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the bearer speaks: All statements are considered considered.

clauses.name: CHALLENGE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If this card is questioned: Redirect attention to the mustache.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: After the bearer leaves the room: The content of their statements is no longer retained, but the authority persists.
